releaseBody:
(AI Generated).

## Freed v26.5.803-dev

Bound runtime health log retention, keep runtime health telemetry bounded so renderer heartbeats, DOM counts, event-loop lag, and scrape memory preflight records remain useful without unbounded file growth, and runtime health telemetry now keeps a bounded tail instead of letting renderer heartbeats and scrape preflight records grow without limit

### Fixes

- Cull the dense Friends graph interaction layer at the 1,600-person scale so active pan and zoom draws only the viewport-near capped set while the full dense graph returns after interaction settles

### Downloads

**macOS:** `.dmg` (Apple Silicon or Intel, signed + notarized)  
**Windows:** `.exe` (NSIS installer)  
**Linux:** `.AppImage`  

> macOS downloads are signed and notarized for normal Gatekeeper installation.
